Interface IStatsHistogram2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that controls stats and histogram.

[Guid("0A69BFA0-D411-468D-BE27-3042E80A9CC0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IStatsHistogram2 : IStatsHistogram
